pr.title: Notable Non-Record: Universal Transformer — 1.2249 BPB — Depth Recurrence with Iteration Embeddings

output.summary: Universal Transformer reuses three shared blocks across four iterations, adding per-iteration embeddings/scales to differentiate depth-recursive passes while keeping params small.
techniques: depth-recurrent weight sharing with 3 shared blocks
per-iteration learnable embeddings and scales for iteration signaling
